subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of the martyr, grieve thou not, for the All-Loving Beloved is the Consoler. Be not sorrowful; let heart and soul rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بضعه الشهید غم مخور محبوب مهربان غمگسار است محزون مباش دل و جان شادمان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
